nodes.label: AI as grammar and spelling checker
nodes.grounding_span: In the case of grammar or spelling mistakes it is very useful

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming catalyst
nodes.grounding_span: I also sometimes use it for brainstorming, a change in perspective can really help

nodes.label: AI as research assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I usually disregard the actual content of that overview and just check the cited webpages instead

nodes.label: Maintaining authorial voice and style
nodes.label_negative: Homogenized writing style due to AI suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: I do try to limit my use of AI, so it's my voice and writing style and not someone else's

nodes.label: User-controlled AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: when it is forced into software it's invasive, encouraging over-reliance

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and individuality
nodes.grounding_span: everyone's style would be the same. No one would have a unique writing style anymore

nodes.label: Productivity and overcoming creative blocks
nodes.grounding_span: I still feel like I was a little more productive than I would have been otherwise

nodes.label: Epistemic reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: providing more accurate responses and even being able to accurately delve into more obscure topics

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for grammar/spelling
nodes.grounding_span: In the case of grammar or spelling mistakes it is very useful

nodes.label: Negative stance toward invasive AI suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: when it is forced into software it's invasive, encouraging over-reliance

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: I think the different perspective provided really helps with that

nodes.label: Ambivalent stance toward AI's future role
nodes.grounding_span: If I'm optimistic, I see AI being more useful... I am, unfortunately, not a very optimistic person

nodes.label: Intentional limitation and selective use of AI
nodes.grounding_span: I do try to limit my use of AI

nodes.label: Slingshot ideation — using AI suggestions as springboard to own ideas
nodes.grounding_span: let them act as a guide to slingshot my mind to an adjacent idea
